headline: Barclays Initiates Coverage On Jack Henry & Associates with Overweight Rating, Announces Price Target of $170
summary: Barclays  analyst Nik Cremo   initiates coverage on Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) with a Overweight rating and announces Price Target of $170.
